creator: chuckr@glue.umd.edu
text:
On Tue, 21 Jan 1997 soil@quick.net wrote:

> 
> >Number:         2546
> >Category:       ports
> >Synopsis:       garbage on first line of ports/editors/gvim/Makefile

I can't see that it matters at all, the text referred to is protected by
"#" comment signs.  If it suited the editor that the porter was using, it
does no one else any harm.
